seoTitle: Lake Margarette vs Lake Muir — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Margarette and Lake Muir. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Margarette vs Lake Muir: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Margarette and Lake Muir.
heading: Lake Margarette vs Lake Muir — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Margarette, Western Australia and Lake Muir, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Muir has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Lake Margarette (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Margarette or Lake Muir safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Margarette has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Lake Muir scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Margarette scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Muir scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Margarette or Lake Muir?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Muir has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
